title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.110 - Qualifications of employees
text:
205.110.  Qualifications of employees. — The qualifications of all persons employed in the operation of said health center shall be at least equal to the minimum standard of qualifications as set forward by the department of health or its successors for positions of like importance and responsibilities.
(L. 1945 p. 969 § 6)
